case_title: CHOW, ANITA VS FOERSTER, JONATHAN CHARLES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHOW, ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT FOERSTER, JONATHAN CHARLES GUGGISBERG, STEVE GUGGISBERG, SHARON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
